summary: Pre-App-Store Audit testing completed. All 5 audit points verified successfully: 1) Email verification gate active in code (index.tsx L88-91, login.tsx L88-92), 2) Zero console.log/console.error in frontend, 3) 7 accessibility props found, 4) eas.json exists with proper structure, 5) Privacy policy at /privacy-policy works and old /menu/privacy returns 404.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed syntax error in /app/frontend/app/live/[id].tsx line 85-87 - extra closing brace in catch block was causing Metro bundler crash
All 5 audit points verified and working correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pre-app-store audit complete. All 5 audit points verified: email verification gate (code review confirms it's active), console.log removal (0 found via grep), accessibility props (7 found), eas.json (exists with proper structure), privacy policy route (works at /privacy-policy, old /menu/privacy returns 404).

bug_fix_applied.issue: Extra closing brace in catch block causing Metro bundler SyntaxError
